iterations.summary: Initialized Ralph Loop for Autonomous Workspace Stabilization & Hardening. Fixed critical Windows Unicode encoding crash in CLI and improved sandbox path security with pathlib.
changes: core/modules/sandbox.py: replaced str.startswith with pathlib.is_relative_to for robust path security
iterations.verification: CLI verified with 'uv run python cli/infinite.py --help' (passed)

iterations.summary: Standardized the orchestrator with System Prompt v4 and implemented an Autofix/Self-Correction loop for tool failures. Verified that execute_cmd operates from the workspace root and correctly handles nested file structures.
changes: core/services/loop_orchestrator.py: Updated system prompt to v4 (Zero-Ambiguity)
core/services/loop_orchestrator.py: Implemented Autofix/Self-Correction message for tool errors
core/modules/base_tools.py: Confirmed execute_cmd uses self.guard.root for CWD
iterations.verification: Ran scratch/verify_stabilization.py which confirmed nested directory/file operations and command execution (passed)
